plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic run when trying to click the 'Select your occupation' combobox. The live failure screenshot reveals that the form fields on Step 1 have been dynamically modified compared to what the cached selectors expected: instead of 'Select your occupation', the visible form contains 'Last Name', 'Email Address', and 'Age Group' (radio buttons), while the cached steps attempted to click '#\\:rl\\:-form-item' / 'Select your occupation'. In addition, there is a dynamic 'Set 1' toggle/current time widget visible. This structural deviation prevents the cached sequence from matching. Clearing the Page AI cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-evaluate the DOM, recognize the actual form fields, and adapt its actions.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the test flow
remediationSteps.details: Re-run the test with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive enabled. This will delete the stale deterministic cache and let Donobu's PageAi dynamically inspect the form and complete it correctly.

plan.notes: Comparing the failure screenshot to the deterministic tool calls shows the cache tried to execute an obsolete sequence. Clearing the AI cache for this test will force a fresh interaction plan that matches the current form structure.
